```python
import heapq

def main():
    import sys
    input = sys.stdin.read
    data = input().split()
    
    N = int(data[0])
    P = list(map(int, data[1:N+1]))
    
    ranks = [0] * N
    max_heap = [(-P[i], i) for i in range(N)]
    heapq.heapify(max_heap)
    
    r = 1
    while max_heap:
        score_neg, idx = heapq.heappop(max_heap)
        current_score = -score_neg
        count = 1
        # Check for other participants with the same score
        while max_heap and -max_heap[0][0] == current_score:
            score_neg2, idx2 = heapq.heappop(max_heap)
            count += 1
        # Assign rank to all participants with this score
        for i in range(count):
            ranks[idx + i] = r
        r += count
    
    for rank in ranks:
        print(rank)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
```
